Mega Ball Tracker, RTP & Game Review

Track Mega Ball stats, results and RTP in real time with live tracker tools. Review ball history, multiplier rounds, winner counts and payout trends in one place.

Play 🎰

Quick Game Overview

Parameter
Details
Provider
Evolution Gaming
Game Name
Mega Ball
Release Year
2023
Game Type
Live Bingo Game Show
RTP
95.30%
Bet Range
Varies by casino
Max Win
Up to 1,000,000x
Balls Drawn
20 balls + Mega Ball + possible 2nd Mega Ball

About Mega Ball

Mega Ball is a fast-paced live game show that combines bingo-style card mechanics with lottery-style bouncing balls. One or two bonus stages can appear after the main draw, adding extra excitement through multipliers.

The goal is to complete as many lines on your cards as possible. More completed lines mean higher payouts, and multiplier rounds can significantly boost qualifying wins.

How To Play

In Mega Ball, 20 balls are drawn one by one from an automatic machine. Matching numbers on the player's cards are marked automatically, and the cards closest to a win are moved to the top of the interface.

After the final ball, a Mega Ball multiplier between 5x and 100x is generated. If the Mega Ball helps complete a line, the payout can be multiplied. In rare cases, a 2nd Mega Ball may also be drawn, giving players another chance at a boosted win.

  • 1 20 balls are drawn in quick succession.
  • 2 Matching numbers are marked automatically on all active cards.
  • 3 Cards nearest to completion move higher in the interface.
  • 4 A Mega Ball multiplier is generated after the main draw.
  • 5 A rare 2nd Mega Ball may create one more chance for a multiplied payout.

Mega Ball Payout

Mega Ball payouts depend on how many lines are completed on a single card. Horizontal, vertical and diagonal lines can all count toward the final prize.

Completed Lines Payout How It Works
1 1:1 1 horizontal, vertical or diagonal line.
2 5:1 2 completed lines on one card.
3 50:1 3 completed lines on one card.
4 500:1 4 completed lines on one card.
5 10,000:1 5 completed lines on one card.
6+ 1,000,000x 6 completed lines on one card.

What You Can Track

On Tracksino, Mega Ball tracker tools focus on the most useful live metrics for round-by-round analysis.

Ball History

Review all drawn balls in exact order.

Mega Ball Multiplier

Track generated multipliers from 5x to 100x.

Total Winners

See how many winning cards or players were paid.

Payout Amounts

Monitor payout totals and compare active rounds.

Watch Mega Ball Live

Open the live game and compare ongoing action with tracker data.

Mega Ball at a Glance

Area Mega Ball Why It Matters
Base format Live bingo-style game show Combines card completion with a live ball draw.
Bonus rounds Mega Ball and rare 2nd Mega Ball Adds multiplier potential after the main draw.
Tracking value High Ball order, winners and payouts are easy to review round by round.
Top win potential Up to 1,000,000x The biggest wins depend on completed lines plus multiplier effects.
Play 🎰

Frequently Asked Questions

Can I track Mega Ball live results?

Yes. A Mega Ball tracker can show ball history, recent payouts, winner counts and multiplier results round by round.

How does the Mega Ball multiplier work?

After the main draw, a multiplier between 5x and 100x is generated. If the Mega Ball completes a winning line, the qualifying payout can be multiplied accordingly.

What is the 2nd Mega Ball?

The 2nd Mega Ball is a rare extra draw that gives players another chance to complete a winning line with multiplier potential.

Is Mega Ball more like bingo or a game show?

It combines both formats. The core mechanics are based on card lines, but the presentation and pacing follow a live casino game show style.

Can tracker data predict future results?

No. Tracker data is useful for reviewing recent rounds and live statistics, but every draw remains independent.
